2603.25209.title: Free-Lunch Long Video Generation via Layer-Adaptive O.O.D Correction
2603.25209.paper_summary: Generating long videos using pre-trained video diffusion models, which are typically trained on short clips, presents a significant challenge. Directly applying these models for long-video inference often leads to a notable degradation in visual quality. This paper identifies that this issue primarily stems from two out-of-distribution (O.O.D) problems: frame-level relative position O.O.D and context-length O.O.D. To address these challenges, we propose FreeLOC, a novel training-free, layer-adaptive framework that introduces two core techniques: Video-based Relative Position Re-encoding (VRPR) for frame-level relative position O.O.D, a multi-granularity strategy that hierarchically re-encodes temporal relative positions to align with the model's pre-trained distribution, and Tiered Sparse Attention (TSA) for context-length O.O.D, which preserves both local detail and long-range dependencies by structuring attention density across different temporal scales. Crucially, we introduce a layer-adaptive probing mechanism that identifies the sensitivity of each transformer layer to these O.O.D issues, allowing for the selective and efficient application of our methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing training-free methods, achieving state-of-the-art results in both temporal consistency and visual quality. Code is available at https://github.com/Westlake-AGI-Lab/FreeLOC.
2603.25209.paper_summary_zh: 生成長視頻使用預訓練的視頻擴散模型，這些模型通常是在短片段上訓練的，面臨著重大的挑戰。直接將這些模型應用於長視頻推斷往往會導致視覺質量的顯著下降。本文指出，這個問題主要源於兩個分佈外（O.O.D）問題：幀級相對位置 O.O.D 和上下文長度 O.O.D。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了 FreeLOC，一個新穎的無需訓練的層自適應框架，該框架引入了兩個核心技術：基於視頻的相對位置重新編碼（VRPR），用於幀級相對位置 O.O.D，一種多粒度策略，層次性地重新編碼時間相對位置，以使其與模型的預訓練分佈對齊，以及分層稀疏注意力（TSA），用於上下文長度 O.O.D，通過在不同的時間尺度上結構化注意力密度來保留局部細節和長距離依賴性。關鍵是，我們引入了一種層自適應探測機制，識別每個Transformer層對這些 O.O.D 問題的敏感性，從而實現我們方法的選擇性和高效應用。大量實驗表明，我們的方法顯著超越現有的無需訓練的方法，在時間一致性和視覺質量上達到最先進的結果。代碼可在 https://github.com/Westlake-AGI-Lab/FreeLOC 獲得。
2603.25209.author: Jiahao Tian et.al.
2603.25209.authors: Jiahao Tian, Chenxi Song, Wei Cheng, Chi Zhang
